summary: Frontend-only Playwright E2E testing for Agentic RAG QA UI. All 14 specified flows passed. Landing page renders with all testids, navigation to /chat works, chat page renders sidebar + empty state + 4 suggestions + input, backend at http://localhost:8000 is unreachable (as designed) and UI correctly shows red error banner + error AI bubble mentioning the API URL, user bubble persists, input clears after send, Enter sends, Shift+Enter adds newline, Send disabled when empty, Clear resets to empty state, Back-to-Home navigates to /, unknown routes redirect to /, file upload attempts POST /api/upload which fails and shows a doc item with 'failed' status without crashing. Dark theme (#0B0F19) confirmed via body bg rgb(11,15,25).
critical_code_review_comments: TypingIndicator renders briefly (<1s) because axios ERR_NETWORK resolves almost instantly on a closed port; not a bug but user may not see the typing state when backend is offline. Consider a minimum display delay (e.g., 300ms) for better perceived feedback.
WebSocket warning 'ws://localhost:443/ws' connection refused originates from WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443 in /app/frontend/.env — harmless for production but noisy in dev console.
React Router v6 future-flag warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) — minor, cosmetic.
seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/upload_test/test.txt (20B) to test upload failure path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI fully verified against the 14 items. Backend at localhost:8000 is intentionally offline — error-state UX is the expected pass criterion. data-testids all present: landing-page, hero-try-demo-btn, hero-upload-doc-btn, features-section, how-it-works-section, site-navbar, site-footer, hero-chat-preview, chat-page, chat-sidebar, sidebar-new-chat-btn, sidebar-upload-btn, sidebar-empty-docs, sidebar-file-input, sidebar-doc-item, chat-empty-state, suggestion-0..3, chat-input, chat-send-btn, chat-clear-btn, chat-back-home-btn, chat-error-banner, chat-message-user, chat-message-ai, typing-indicator.
